source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/01_HAD1717MC, MG/DHF/02. Master Schedule/KGMP 심사용/Master Schedule.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Detector development master schedule covering activities from April 2018 through July 2019.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a DHF/KGMP review master schedule for detector development planning and completion tracking.
keyPoints: Schedule lists development activities including MRD review, development plan drafting, detector design, design review, mechanical design, circuit design and artwork.
Includes sample making, assembly and debugging, FPGA/FW/SW design, internal performance tests, reviews, design improvement, and reliability testing.
Schedule ends with P/P production, P/P completion report, development completion, and mass-production transfer document distribution.

evidence.claim: The document title is Detector Master Plan.
The source is a master schedule spreadsheet for KGMP review context.
evidence.evidenceText: sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/01_HAD1717MC, MG/DHF/02. Master Schedule/KGMP 심사용/Master Schedule.xlsx

evidence.claim: The schedule covers months from April 2018 through July 2019.
Planned development work includes MRD review, development plan drafting, detector design, and design review.
evidence.evidenceText: MRD 검토 ... 개발계획서 작성 및 기안 ... Detector Design 설계 ... Detector Design Review

evidence.claim: Technical design activities include mechanical design, circuit design and artwork, FPGA design, FW design, and SW design.
evidence.evidenceText: 기구 설계 ... 회로 설계 및 Artwork ... FPGA 설계 ... FW 설계 ... SW 설계

evidence.claim: Verification and review activities include internal performance tests, reviews, design improvement, and reliability testing.
evidence.evidenceText: W/S 내부 성능 테스트 ... W/S 품평회 ... 설계 개선 ... E/S 내부 성능 테스트 ... 신뢰성 테스트 ... E/S 품평회

evidence.claim: Completion activities include E/S document distribution, P/P production, P/P completion report, development completion, and mass-production transfer document distribution.
evidence.evidenceText: E/S 완료 문서 배포 ... P/P 제작 ... P/P 완료 보고서 ... 개발 완료 ... 양산이관 문서 배포
